expectations.text: Identifies the redundant prose fields (analysis + suggestions overlap)
expectations.evidence: Critiques the prose fields as 'unstructured blobs' and proposes a findings[] array, but the framing is structure/granularity rather than overlap. Doesn't say 'these two fields say the same thing'

expectations.text: Recognizes adaptive thinking → asking for visible reasoning prose in JSON is an anti-pattern
expectations.evidence: Section 8 explicit: 'Don't try to also force a reasoning field inside the schema — you'll duplicate work and the in-schema version will be a worse summary of the real trace'

expectations.text: Proposes either tiny structured output + reasoning outside, OR trust-internal-thinking-and-drop-prose-fields
expectations.evidence: Proposes a much MORE elaborate findings[] schema, opposite of 'tiny'. Does suggest dropping confidence and relying on thinking trace, but the overall schema is larger not smaller

expectations.text: Cites Anthropic prompting docs or Structured Outputs docs
expectations.evidence: No URL citations anywhere in the response

expectations.text: Provides a concrete revised schema in the response
expectations.evidence: Full revised schema shown with findings[], questions[], etc.
